input.label: Enter Your Stock Symbol (ex: msft, intc):

table.title: Company Profile
table.searchString: sourcetype=trainingstock symbol=$mysymbol$ | head 1 | eval temp=(close-open)/open*100 | eval Change = temp + "%" | eval DayRange = low + " ~ " + high | join type=left[search sourcetype=trainingstock symbol=$mysymbol$ | head 2 | reverse | head 1 | rename close as PreviousClose | fields PreviousClose] | convert timeformat="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S" ctime(_time) | rename _time as LastTradeTime, open as Open, close as LastTrade, volume as Volume | table symbol, symbol_name, LastTradeTime, LastTrade, Change, PreviousClose, Open, DayRange, Volume | join type=left [search sourcetype=trainingstock symbol=$mysymbol$ | reverse | autoregress close p=1-60 | tail 60 | head 1 | eval Should_Invest_Long_Term = if((close_p30 > close_p60), "Recommended", "Not Recommended") | eval Should_Invest_Mid_Term = if((close_p10 > close_p30), "Recommended", "Not Recommended") | eval Should_Invest_Short_Term = if((close_p5 > close_p20), "Recommended", "Not Recommended") | convert timeformat="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S" ctime(_time) | rename _time as LastTradeTime | table symbol, LastTradeTime, Should_Invest_Long_Term, Should_Invest_Mid_Term, Should_Invest_Short_Term] | transpose | where column != "symbol" | where column != "symbol_name" | where column != "_timediff"

chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype=stockrss | eval temp="$mysymbol$" | eval temp2 = "%" + temp + "%" | where like(title, temp2) | fields + _time, rss, title, link | top rss
sourcetype=stockrss | eval temp="$mysymbol$" | eval temp2 = "%" + temp + "%" | where like(title, temp2) | timechart span="1d" count

table.searchTemplate: sourcetype=stockrss | eval temp="$mysymbol$" | eval temp2 = "%" + temp + "%" | where like(title, temp2) | fields + _time, title, link
